allow: PowerShell(Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -in @\('curl','python','python3'\) } | Select-Object Id, Name, CPU, WorkingSet)
PowerShell(Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -match "greencube|tauri|python|curl" } | Select-Object Id, Name, CPU)
PowerShell(Get-Process -Id 7932 | Select-Object Id, Name, StartTime, CommandLine 2>&1; \(Get-WmiObject Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=7932"\).CommandLine)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\models\\.cache" -Recurse | Where-Object { !$_.PSIsContainer } | Select-Object Name, @{N="Size_GB";E={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1GB,2\)}}, FullName | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Users\\mateu\\.cache\\huggingface\\hub" -Recurse -Force | Where-Object { $_.Length -gt 100MB } | Select-Object Name, @{N="Size_GB";E={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1GB,2\)}}, FullName | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; Get-ChildItem "C:\\models\\.cache" -Recurse -Force | Select-Object Name, Length, LastWriteTime | Format-Table -AutoSize; Write-Output "---"; Get-ChildItem "C:\\models" -Force | Where-Object { $_.Length -gt 0 } | Select-Object Name, @{N="Size_GB";E={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1GB,2\)}}, LastWriteTime | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "$env:TEMP" | Where-Object { $_.LastWriteTime -gt \(Get-Date\).AddMinutes\(-60\) -and $_.Length -gt 100MB } | Select-Object Name, @{N="Size_GB";E={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1GB,2\)}}, LastWriteTime | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "$env:USERPROFILE\\.cache\\huggingface" -Force -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Length -gt 50MB } | Select-Object FullName, @{N="Size_GB";E={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1GB,2\)}} | Sort-Object Size_GB -Descending | Select-Object -First 10)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Users\\mateu" -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.PSIsContainer -and $_.LastWriteTime -gt \(Get-Date\).AddHours\(-2\) } | Select-Object Name, LastWriteTime)
